name: Rich Text Editors
description: Web-based rich text editor libraries for building content editing experiences

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: Brief description of the editor's main value proposition

attributes.name: Website
attributes.description: Official website or documentation

attributes.name: Repository
attributes.description: GitHub or GitLab repository URL

attributes.name: License
attributes.description: Software license (MIT, Apache-2.0, GPL-3.0, Commercial, etc.)

attributes.name: Initial Release
attributes.description: Year of first public release

attributes.name: Latest Release
attributes.description: Date of most recent stable release

attributes.name: GitHub Stars
attributes.description: Number of GitHub stars

attributes.name: Framework
attributes.description: Supported frameworks

attributes.name: Base Library
attributes.description: Underlying editor library if this is a wrapper (e.g., ProseMirror, Slate)

attributes.name: Data Model
attributes.description: How content is stored internally

attributes.name: TypeScript
attributes.description: Written in TypeScript or has official type definitions

attributes.name: Bundle Size
attributes.description: Minified + gzipped size of core package

attributes.name: Headless Mode
attributes.description: Can run without UI for server-side processing

attributes.name: Real-time Collaboration
attributes.description: Built-in or official plugin for real-time multi-user editing

attributes.name: Collaboration Protocol
attributes.description: Technology used for real-time collaboration

attributes.name: Offline Support
attributes.description: Can queue changes while offline and sync when reconnected

attributes.name: Change Tracking
attributes.description: Track changes / revision history like Word's review mode

attributes.name: Comments
attributes.description: Inline comments or annotations on content

attributes.name: Tables
attributes.description: Create and edit tables with rows and columns

attributes.name: Images
attributes.description: Insert, resize, and position images

attributes.name: Embeds
attributes.description: Embed videos, iframes, or other external content

attributes.name: Code Blocks
attributes.description: Fenced code blocks with syntax highlighting

attributes.name: Math/LaTeX
attributes.description: Render mathematical equations

attributes.name: Mentions
attributes.description: @mention functionality for users or entities

attributes.name: Emoji Picker
attributes.description: Built-in emoji insertion triggered by :colon: syntax

attributes.name: Slash Commands
attributes.description: Forward-slash menu for inserting blocks (like Notion's / menu)

attributes.name: Drag & Drop Blocks
attributes.description: Reorder content blocks via drag and drop

attributes.name: Nested Blocks
attributes.description: Support for nested or indented block structures

attributes.name: Toolbar
attributes.description: Toolbar style options

attributes.name: Mobile Support
attributes.description: Officially tested and supported on mobile browsers

attributes.name: Keyboard Shortcuts
attributes.description: Comprehensive keyboard shortcut support

attributes.name: Accessibility
attributes.description: ARIA labels, screen reader support, WCAG compliance

attributes.name: Undo/Redo
attributes.description: Built-in history management

attributes.name: Find & Replace
attributes.description: Search and replace functionality

attributes.name: Spell Check
attributes.description: Native or integrated spell checking

attributes.name: Plugin System
attributes.description: Documented API for extending functionality via plugins

attributes.name: Custom Nodes
attributes.description: Define custom block or inline node types

attributes.name: Custom Marks
attributes.description: Define custom inline formatting (marks/decorations)

attributes.name: Schema Customization
attributes.description: Modify or extend the document schema

attributes.name: Themes
attributes.description: Built-in theming or CSS customization support

attributes.name: Documentation Quality
attributes.description: Quality of documentation (1=minimal, 5=excellent)

attributes.name: npm Weekly Downloads
attributes.description: Weekly download count from npm

attributes.name: Active Maintenance
attributes.description: Regular commits or releases in the last 6 months

attributes.name: Commercial Support
attributes.description: Paid support or enterprise tier available
